title: Flows Migration — obj_flow_tenant → vector_artefacts flows/flow_states tables
status_note: Substantially complete on handler/route side as of 2026-05-14. flows.Service constructed with (vaPool, mainPool) at main.go ~L476; route registered under /_site/flows (PLA-0031 / M1) at main.go ~L1396. Every data read goes to vaPool; mainPool is tenancy gate only. ETL state from obj_flow_tenant → vector_artefacts.flows is unverified — needs row-count check before formal close. PLA-0033 obsoleted this plan's deferrals; remaining work is verification + openapi paperwork.
scope: Migrate the /flows API endpoint from the legacy obj_flow_tenant table in mmff_vector to the flows / flow_states / flow_transitions tables that already exist in vector_artefacts. The legacy schema is subscription-scoped with polymorphic type FKs (system_artefact_type_id, tenant_artefact_type_id, portfolio_item_type_id). The vaPool schema uses a single artefact_type_id FK into artefact_types with a standard workspace_id tenancy gate. A one-time ETL step migrates live data; the handler service is rewritten to query vaPool; the route is registered under /samantha/v2; the v1 registration is removed.
value: Unblocks /flows from v1, removing one of the major blockers to PLA-0030 Task 10 (v1 block removal). Collapses the dual-pool complexity from the flows handler. Enables the work-items flow-state assignment to resolve from the same DB as the artefact, eliminating a cross-DB join that currently runs in-process.
implementation_plan: Task 1: Schema audit — map obj_flow_tenant columns to flows/flow_states/flow_transitions in vector_artefacts; document the subscription_id → workspace_id tenancy translation; identify any data not representable in the vaPool schema.

Task 2: ETL migration — write a one-off migration script (Go or SQL) that reads obj_flow_tenant rows from mmff_vector and inserts corresponding flows + flow_states + flow_transitions rows into vector_artefacts scoped to the matching workspace. Handle the three polymorphic FK variants (system/tenant/portfolio) by resolving to artefact_type_id via artefact_types.

Task 3: Rewrite flows.Service to query vaPool — new constructor takes vectorArtefactsPool; List query reads flows JOIN artefact_types scoped by workspace_id; tenancy gate uses mmff_vector pool for membership check only (as per T3/T4a pattern).
Task 4: Register /flows under /samantha/v2 in main.go; remove /samantha/v1 flows registration.
Task 5: Update frontend callers — find all api('/flows') call sites and switch to apiV2('/flows').
Task 6: Update openapi-v2.yaml — add /flows paths; update openapi.yaml to mark /flows as Deprecated.
Task 7: Update docs/c_c_v1_v2_cutover.md and PLA-0030 work_item_backlog; update this plan.
areas_impacted: Backend: backend/internal/flows/service.go — full rewrite against vaPool
Backend: backend/cmd/server/main.go — v2 registration, v1 deregistration
Frontend: all api('/flows') call sites → apiV2('/flows')
Data: ETL script migrating obj_flow_tenant → flows/flow_states in vector_artefacts

ETL migration script: obj_flow_tenant → vector_artefacts
work_item_backlog.note: Code is in place but row-count parity vs obj_flow_tenant has not been confirmed against dev DB on 2026-05-14

work_item_backlog.title: Rewrite flows.Service to query vaPool
work_item_backlog.note: Verified at backend/internal/flows/service.go — all reads/writes use vaPool; mainPool is tenancy gate only

work_item_backlog.note: Mounted at /_site/flows in main.go ~L1400; /samantha/v1 block entirely removed from main.go

work_item_backlog.note: check_callers.py run needed to confirm zero api('/flows') call sites remain

work_item_backlog.note: openapi.yaml v1-deprecation paperwork (PLA-0030 Task 9) still pending project-wide

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /samantha/v2/flows returns 200 with workflow data sourced from vector_artefacts
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: curl smoke test; verify response matches obj_flow_tenant data via comparison script

acceptance_criteria.criterion: GET /samantha/v1/flows returns 410 Gone (route removed) after cutover
acceptance_criteria.note: Achieved by stronger means — the entire /samantha/v1 r.Route(...) block was removed from main.go under PLA-0039 transport restructure. Any /samantha/v1/* request now hits chi's 404 path.

acceptance_criteria.criterion: check_callers.py reports 0 api('/flows') callers in frontend

risks.risk: Schema mismatch between obj_flow_tenant (polymorphic type FKs: system/tenant/portfolio) and vaPool flows (single artefact_type_id) — some legacy rows may not map cleanly if artefact_type lookup fails
risks.mitigation: ETL script logs unmapped rows; schema audit (Task 1) identifies gaps before data is moved

risks.risk: obj_flow_tenant uses subscription_id tenancy; vaPool uses workspace_id — mapping may not be 1:1 if a subscription has multiple workspaces with divergent flow configs
risks.mitigation: Audit during Task 1; ETL duplicates rows per workspace if needed, or documents the mapping decision
